mnemonics.title: SIZE Categories
mnemonics.content: S.I.Z.E. = Small (<10K LOC), Intermediate (10K-100K), Zero (irony for large), Extra Large (>1M). Or remember: 'SImple Zero to Extra Large' - Simple, Intermediate, Zero (large), Extra large.

mnemonics.title: COCOMO Types
mnemonics.content: O.S.E. = Organic (Simple), Semi-detached (moderate), Embedded (complex). Remember: 'All OSE projects' - an acronym for the three types.

mnemonics.title: Safety Levels
mnemonics.content: A.B.C.D. = Always Be Careful, Don't fail. Level A is highest criticality.

mnemonics.title: Project Duration
mnemonics.content: S.M.L. = Short (<6mo), Medium (6-18mo), Long (>18mo). Remember: 'See More Length' for longer durations.

acronyms.usage: Primary metric for measuring project size
Countable code metric for project sizing
Standard modeling language for software design

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a spectrum: Small (toy) → Medium (car) → Large (ship) → Very Large (city). Each step represents 10x increase in LOC.
Pyramid with Level A at top (smallest but most rigorous) → Level D at base (largest, least critical). Width represents number of systems at each level.
Three corners: Organic (bottom-left, familiar), Semi-detached (middle), Embedded (top-right, constrained). Project moves based on team experience and constraints.
Timeline showing Short (<6mo), Medium (6-18mo), Long (>18mo) with increasing documentation icons at each stage.

analogies.analogy: Like building types: small is a shed, medium is a house, large is an apartment building, very large is a city skyscraper - each requiring different planning and resources.
Like transportation: Level A is spacecraft (extreme testing), Level B is commercial aircraft, Level C is car, Level D is bicycle - different safety standards for each.
Cooking analogy: Organic = following a familiar recipe easily, Semi-detached = cooking with occasional reference to cookbook, Embedded = cooking under strict restaurant constraints.
Individual is solo musical performance, Small team is a band, Large team is an orchestra, Distributed is a virtual choir across countries.
